title: Hamster Mod
description: This is a Hamster Mod Concept
body:
![Hello World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d744eca6501f0de68ab7c3414d00bebd468d37a4_0.webp)



# Overview:
This is a Hamster Mod Concept that I intend to consistently update for the newest possible version of Minecraft. As you can tell it is very rudimentary because I made it in MCreator, and it is essentially my first mod.

# Features:
A very basic Hamster... That's about it. They are one color for now, and can be "Tamed" with seeds, but that functionally isn't fleshed out yet.
